label: At M_A >= 1 continuum overlap opens uncontrolled SARI spectrum

provenance.source_span: The Astrophysical Journal Supplement Series, 259:65 (41pp), 2022 April https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-4365/ac573c © 2022. The Author(s). Published by the American Astronomical Society. The Super-Alfvénic Rotational Instability in Accretion Disks about Black Holes

strengths: Defines M_A >= 1 as a natural operating boundary for Atlas.
weaknesses: The transition near M_A=1 still needs width and robustness analysis.
